description: Mandatory review gates. Tasks matching a gate are auto-blocked until reviewed.

gates.description: Any output visible to people outside the system
gates.block_message: User-facing output requires review before delivery.

gates.description: Any write operation to Pipedrive or external CRM
gates.block_message: CRM write operations require Bridge approval.

gates.description: Email sends, Slack messages, any outbound communication
gates.block_message: External messages require explicit human approval.
High-complexity knowledge changes should be reviewed.
